sentences.target: Tu imposes ton choix à tout le monde.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛ̃poz tɔ̃ ʃwa a tulə mɔ̃d/

translations.fr: Tu imposes ton choix à tout le monde.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛ̃poz tɔ̃ ʃwa a tulə mɔ̃d/
translations.en: You force your choice on everyone.
translations.es: Impones tu elección a todo el mundo.
translations.de: Du zwingst allen deine Wahl auf.
translations.it: Imponi la tua scelta a tutti.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把你的选择强加给所有人。
translations.yue: 你逼所有人接受你嘅選擇。
translations.pt: Você impõe sua escolha a todos.
translations.he: אתה כופה את הבחירה שלך על כולם.
translations.vi: Bạn áp đặt lựa chọn của mình lên mọi người.
translations.nl: Je dringt je keuze aan iedereen op.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी पसंद सब पर थोपते हो.
translations.el: Επιβάλλεις την επιλογή σου σε όλους.
translations.id: Kamu memaksakan pilihanmu kepada semua orang.
translations.ja: あなたはみんなに自分の選択を押し付けている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'choix'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'imposes'.
Preposition introducing the indirect object.
Determiner quantifying 'le monde' in the idiomatic NP 'tout le monde' (everyone).
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'monde'.
Common noun, masculine; head of 'tout le monde' functioning as indirect object of 'à'.

sentences.target: On impose une limite de dix minutes.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɛ̃poz yn limit də dis minyt/

translations.fr: On impose une limite de dix minutes.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɛ̃poz yn limit də dis minyt/
translations.es: Ponemos un límite de diez minutos.
translations.de: Wir setzen ein Zeitlimit von zehn Minuten.
translations.it: Stabiliamo un limite di dieci minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们设定十分钟的限制。
translations.yue: 我哋定出十分鐘嘅時限。
translations.ru: Мы устанавливаем лимит в десять минут.
translations.pt: Nós definimos um limite de dez minutos.
translations.he: אנחנו קובעים מגבלה של עשר דקות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đặt giới hạn mười phút.
translations.ar: نحن نضع حدًا قدره عشر دقائق.
translations.nl: We stellen een limiet van tien minuten in.
translations.uk: Ми встановлюємо ліміт у десять хвилин.
translations.hi: हम दस मिनट की सीमा तय करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi setter en grense på ti minutter.
translations.id: Kami menetapkan batas waktu sepuluh menit.
translations.sv: Vi sätter en gräns på tio minuter.
translations.ro: Stabilim o limită de zece minute.
translations.da: Vi sætter en grænse på ti minutter.
translations.ja: 私たちは10分の制限を設けます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun ('one/people/we').
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'limite'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'impose'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes' (liaison to [diz] before 'minutes' in context).
Common noun, feminine plural; measure complement headed by 'dix'.

sentences.target: Je n’aime pas imposer mes goûts.

translations.fr: Je n’aime pas imposer mes goûts.
translations.en: I don't like imposing my tastes.
translations.es: No me gusta imponer mis gustos.
translations.de: Ich mag es nicht, meinen Geschmack aufzuzwingen.
translations.it: Non mi piace imporre i miei gusti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不喜欢把自己的喜好强加给别人。
translations.yue: 我唔鍾意將自己嘅喜好強加畀人。
translations.ru: Мне не нравится навязывать свои вкусы.
translations.pt: Não gosto de impor meus gostos.
translations.he: אני לא אוהב לכפות את הטעם שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi không thích áp đặt sở thích của mình.
translations.nl: Ik houd er niet van om mijn smaak op te dringen.
translations.uk: Мені не подобається нав'язувати свої смаки.
translations.hi: मुझे अपनी पसंद थोपना पसंद नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν μου αρέσει να επιβάλλω τα γούστα μου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker ikke å påtvinge smaken min.
translations.id: Saya tidak suka memaksakan selera saya.
translations.sv: Jag gillar inte att påtvinga min smak.
translations.ro: Nu îmi place să îmi impun gusturile.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke lide at påtvinge min smag.
translations.fi: En pidä siitä, että tuputan omaa makuani.
translations.ja: 自分の好みを押し付けるのは好きではありません。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; carries attached negative clitic 'n’' and forms the 'ne … pas' negation with 'pas'.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne … pas' construction.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'aimer' (thing disliked).
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies 'goûts'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'imposer'.

sentences.target: Nous imposons des règles simples à la maison.
sentences.reading: /nu ɛ̃pozɔ̃ de ʁɛgl sɛ̃pl a la mɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous imposons des règles simples à la maison.
translations.ipa: /nu ɛ̃pozɔ̃ de ʁɛgl sɛ̃pl a la mɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: We enforce simple rules at home.
translations.de: Wir setzen zu Hause einfache Regeln durch.
translations.it: Facciamo rispettare regole semplici a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在家里执行简单的规则。
translations.yue: 我哋喺屋企實施簡單嘅規矩。
translations.pt: Nós aplicamos regras simples em casa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi áp dụng các quy tắc đơn giản ở nhà.
translations.ar: نحن نفرض قواعد بسيطة في المنزل.
translations.hi: हम घर पर सरल नियम लागू करते हैं.
translations.id: Kami menerapkan aturan sederhana di rumah.
translations.ja: 家庭では簡単なルールを徹底しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Nous'.
Indefinite article, plural; determines 'règles'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'imposons'.
Adjective, plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'règles'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'maison'.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'à' in the fixed expression 'à la maison' (at home).
